song.title: Days of Salvation
song.author: Jeff Martin
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) These are the days of salvation
Our past has been washed by His blood
And these are the days of redemption, for you
Sinners become sons of God
And though you might feel you’re unworthy
Still Jesus has called you by name
Now we will proclaim to all nations ‘round us
“Repent and believe in the Lord!”
[C] Chorus . A D Behold He comes Christ our risen Lord . A E Let the trumpets ring Hosannas to the King . A D Lift your voice It’s the year of Jubilee . A E A-D-A In the name of Jesus Christ Salvation comes!
[V2] 2) These are the days of rejoicing Lift up your praise to our King And these are the days of pressing forward As brothers and sisters we sing
[V2] And these are the days of Your kingdom We stand and declare to the world That we are forever one in Spirit Declaring the Name of the Lord!
[E] 1) These are the days of salvation Our past has been washed by His blood And these are the days of redemption for you Sinners become sons of God And though you might feel you’re unworthy Still Jesus has called you by name Now we will proclaim to all nations ‘round us “Repent and believe in the Lord!” Chorus Behold He comes, Christ our risen Lord Let the trumpets ring, Hosannas to the King Lift your voice, it’s the year of Jubilee In the name of Jesus Christ salvation comes! 2) These are the days of rejoicing Lift up your praise to our King And these are the days of pressing forward As brothers and sisters we sing And these are the days of Your kingdom We stand and declare to the world That we are forever one in Spirit Declaring the Name of the Lord!
